title: seseli gummiferum subsp. gummiferum
intro: Seseli gummiferum subsp. gummiferum, also known as Gummi-Sesel or Carrot-root, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Seseli gummiferum subsp. gummiferum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. Seseli gummiferum subsp. gummiferum is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms of herbal remedies.
